hero.title: You're

howItWorks.subtitle: From URL to stunning redesign in minutes, not months.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Enter your website address. Our AI starts analyzing instantly.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Performance, SEO, security, UX, content — we check everything.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Choose from 3 unique redesigns. Pay only if you love it.

analysisDemo.title: We Don't Guess. We Measure.
analysisDemo.subtitle: 50+ parameters across 6 categories. Real data, real insights.
analysisDemo.performanceItems: Load time, Core Web Vitals, image optimization, compression
analysisDemo.seoItems: Meta tags, headings, sitemap, structured data, indexability
analysisDemo.securityItems: HTTPS, security headers, mixed content, GDPR compliance
analysisDemo.uxItems: Mobile responsiveness, color contrast, CTA visibility, navigation
analysisDemo.contentItems: Readability, freshness, trust signals, contact info, structure
analysisDemo.aiVisibilityItems: AI crawlability, FAQ schema, content structure for AI summaries

roi.title: What Would This Normally Cost?
roi.subtitle: A professional redesign involves multiple specialists and weeks of work.
roi.noRisk: Don't love it? Don't pay. Your redesign gets deleted after 7 days.

testimonials.title: Before & After
testimonials.subtitle: See the transformation. Real websites, real results.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What if I don't like the redesign?
faq.a1: You don't pay. Simple as that. If you don't confirm within 7 days, the redesign gets permanently deleted. Zero risk.
faq.q2: Do I get the source code?
faq.a2: Yes. You get the complete source code — HTML, CSS, JavaScript, images, everything. No vendor lock-in, no proprietary platform.
faq.q3: How long does the analysis take?
faq.a3: The initial analysis takes about 60 seconds. Your 3 redesign proposals are ready within minutes.
faq.a4: We check 50+ parameters: page speed, SEO, security headers, mobile responsiveness, content quality, accessibility, AI visibility, and more.
faq.q5: Can I request changes to the design?
faq.a5: Yes! After selecting your preferred design, you can request adjustments via our AI-powered editor before confirming.
faq.a6: We transfer the complete website to your domain. You own everything — the code, the design, the content. No subscriptions, no ongoing fees.
faq.q7: Is my credit card charged immediately?
faq.a7: No. We save your payment method for verification only. You're charged only when you explicitly confirm after reviewing the final result.
faq.a8: We build with modern technologies: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS. Fast, SEO-friendly, and easy to maintain.

finalCta.title: Your New Website Is 5 Minutes Away
finalCta.subtitle: Paste your URL. Get an instant upgrade — modern design, better content, future-ready.

editor.title: AI Editor
editor.description: Describe what you want to change
editor.descriptionSub: The AI will modify the HTML of this variant
editor.enterToSend: Press Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line
editor.upsellIntro: I understand what you need. That goes beyond HTML editing, but our team can help.
editor.outOfScope: This change is beyond the editor capabilities.
editor.suggestion1: Change the header color to blue
editor.suggestion4: Change the hero background to a gradient
editor.suggestion5: Add hover effects to service cards
editor.suggestion6: Update the footer — add social links
editor.suggestHoursDesc: The page does not include opening hours information.
editor.suggestHoursInstruction: Add an opening hours section (Mon-Fri 9:00-17:00, Sat 9:00-12:00, Sun closed) before the footer.
editor.suggestFormDesc: A contact form is missing for easy inquiries.
editor.suggestFormInstruction: Add a contact form with Name, Email, Message fields and a Submit button to the contact section.
editor.suggestGalleryDesc: Add a photo gallery for visual presentation.
editor.suggestGalleryInstruction: Add a photo gallery section with 6 placeholder images in a 3x2 grid with hover effects before the footer.
editor.suggestMapDesc: Add a map to help visitors find your location.
editor.suggestMapInstruction: Add a Google Maps iframe with a placeholder location to the contact section.
editor.suggestTestimonialsInstruction: Add a section with 3 customer testimonials — each with a quote, name, and star rating.
editor.suggestPhoneDesc: Phone numbers are not clickable for mobile devices.
editor.suggestPhoneInstruction: Wrap all phone numbers on the page in tel: protocol links for easy mobile calling.
editor.suggestFaqDesc: An FAQ section improves SEO and answers common questions.
editor.suggestFaqInstruction: Add an FAQ section with 5 relevant questions and answers in accordion style.
editor.suggestLazyDesc: {count} images without lazy loading may slow down page load.
editor.suggestLazyInstruction: Add loading="lazy" attribute to all images except the first hero image.

comparison.title: Variant Comparison
comparison.subtitle: Compare all variants side by side and choose the best one

analysis.resultsSubtitle: Here are the results for your website
analysis.chooseDirection: Choose the direction that matches your vision
analysis.unlockDescription: Enter your email to access all findings, recommendations, and redesign variants.
analysis.noSpam: No spam. We'll send you the report and redesign proposals.
analysis.analysisTakingTooLong: Analysis is taking too long. Server is probably not responding. Please try again.
analysis.quickWinsDesc: High impact, low effort — start with these
analysis.strategicDesc: High impact, higher effort — plan these
analysis.templatesDesc: Pages sharing the same HTML template. Fix the template to resolve issues on all pages at once.
analysis.unlockReportDesc: Get detailed fix instructions, expected improvements, business impact analysis, and a downloadable PDF report for every finding.
analysis.unlockReportGuarantee: One-time payment. Full report access forever.
analysis.lockedFindingHint: Unlock the full report to see detailed fix instructions and expected improvements.

success.title: Payment Successful!
success.description: Thank you for your purchase. Your redesign is confirmed and our team will begin the handover process.
success.nextStep1: 1. We will prepare your selected redesign for deployment.
success.nextStep2: 2. You will receive an email with the full source code and deployment instructions.
success.nextStep3: 3. Our team is available for any questions during the transition.
success.reportDescription: Your full analysis report is now available. You can download the PDF or view all findings with detailed fix instructions.
success.reportNextStep1: 1. All findings now include detailed how-to-fix instructions.
success.reportNextStep2: 2. Download your PDF report anytime from the analysis page.
success.reportNextStep3: 3. Use the action plan to prioritize improvements.
